name: Progress
description: Determinate progress indicators that communicate completion state using CircularProgress and LinearProgress variants.

value.description: Current progress value. For determinate mode, provide value within min/max range.

bufferValue.description: Optional buffer indicator value for pending progress state.

hideLabel.description: Hides the rendered percentage label when true.

slots.label: Built-in percentage text label rendered unless hideLabel is true.

keyboard: No direct keyboard interaction; component is informational
aria: Provide descriptive aria-label text that identifies what is loading
aria-valuemin and aria-valuemax reflect min/max props
aria-valuenow is present for determinate values and omitted for linear indeterminate mode
